sections.kind: Added — Agregat Kependudukan format (Data Agregat Kependudukan semesteran, sheet PDDK)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — Added `agregat_kependudukan` format auto-detection for Data Agregat Kependudukan semesteran (sheet `PDDK`, title `DATA AGREGAT KEPENDUDUKAN ...`). Detects metadata from header rows (Provinsi/Kabupaten/Kecamatan/Desa), parses 14-column layout: NO, NIK, Nama, JK, Kota/TTL, Agama, Status, HubKel, PDDIK, Pekerjaan, Nama Ibu, Nama Ayah. Residence facts populated from document-level metadata. 3.833 persons parsed.
`templates/data_induk_desa.json` — Notes updated with Agregat Kependudukan format detection guidance.

sections.kind: Processed — Data Agregat Kependudukan Semester I 2013 — Desa Karangasem
items: 3.833 persons — Doc `01KSN3JYHVN61A6CJA9255HHE2`, template `data_induk_desa`.

sections.kind: Enhanced — data_induk_desa parser: Data Penduduk per-dusun format
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — Added "datapenduduk" format auto-detection for per-dusun population data sheets. Detects sheets with dusun names and NIK columns (16+ digit), parses primary sheet with 19-column layout (KK, NIK, nama, SHDK, gender, POB, DOB, marital, parents, education, religion, occupation, dusun, RT/RW, zip, village, district). Handles 13-15 column variants via content heuristics.
`scripts/pipeline/row.py` — XLS bypass now runs parser subprocess before extract (cwd=SCRIPTS_DIR, -m parsers.*), producing row.json for `parsed_json_xlsx` profile.
`scripts/processors/process_data_induk_desa.py` — Fallback default fact for persons with no facts (same pattern as process_bip fix).
3.361 persons — Doc `01KSN0EM20WBTTG9KP2EQ3SH99`, template `data_induk_desa`.

sections.kind: Added — parse_penduduk_compress: compressed multi-sheet XLSX parser
items: `scripts/parsers/parse_penduduk_compress.py` — New bespoke parser for compressed XLSX workbooks where multiple persons are packed into single cells with `\n` separators (print-optimized layout). Handles 371-sheet workbook with per-dusun tables; supports two NIK column formats (NO+NIK alternating with local KK, and bare NIK alternating with local KK). Extracts NIK, Nama, No KK, Dusun, RW, RT, Umur, Pendidikan, Pekerjaan, Status Kawin, STA from packed cells + attribute rows. Dedup by NIK across sheets.
4.834 persons — Doc `01KSN22P4PTAYV30YXV504ADRN`, template `data_induk_desa`.

`templates/kk_2018.json` — New template for Kartu Keluarga (KK) XLS documents with repeating blocks (KK header + anggota rows). Field mapping: NIK→national_id, NAMA→full_name, JK→gender, TMPT LAHIR→pob, TGL_LAHIR→dob, AGAMA→religion, STATUS→marital_status, PEKERJAAN→occupation, IBU→mother_maiden_name, plus extra for GDR, SHDRT, PDDK, AYAH, PARAF, No.KK, Alamat.

`scripts/parsers/parse_kk_2018.py` — Bespoke parser for KK XLS format: detects KK header blocks (NO. KK, NAMA. KK, ALAMAT) then reads person rows with NO/NIK/NAMA/JK/TTL/GDR/AGAMA/STATUS/SHRDT/PDDK/PEKERJAAN/IBU/AYAH. Dedup by NIK.
`scripts/processors/process_kk_2018.py` — Batch processor for KK data, creates document + 4351 persons via BatchProcessor.
4.351 persons — Doc `01KSMY5HKK8MP2J0HQH4SYHE3Z`, template `kk_2018`.

sections.kind: Added — bip template (Buku Induk Kependudukan XLS)
items: `templates/bip.json` — New template for Buku Induk Kependudukan (BIP) XLS documents. Mirip KK dengan kolom geser 1 (kolom 0 kosong). Field mapping: NIK→national_id, NAMA→full_name, JK→gender, TMPT LHR→pob, TGL LHR→dob, AGAMA→religion, STATUS→marital_status, PEKERJAAN→occupation, NAMA IBU→mother_maiden_name, plus extra untuk G.DRH, HUB.KEL, PENDIDIKAN, NAMA AYAH, No.KK, Alamat, wilayah.

`scripts/parsers/parse_bip.py` — Bespoke parser for BIP XLS format: handles multi-sheet (BIP_Desa-Kel_1 + BIP_Desa-Kel_x), xlrd date cells properly, metadata rows (PROVINSI/KABUPATEN/KECAMATAN/DESA), KK header blocks dengan Excel formula.
`scripts/processors/process_bip.py` — Batch processor for BIP data, creates document + 3683 persons via BatchProcessor.

sections.kind: Added — agent prompts & docs aligned with post–Fase E architecture
items: `AGENT.md` — orchestrator-first policy; canonical paths (`pipeline/row.py`, `pipeline/routes.py`, `intake/queue_manager.py`); removed references to deleted `scripts/queue.py` and `pipeline_routes.py`; `queue_entries.expected`; outcomes `needs_review` + fase `photos`; `prepare-commit --commit`; platform parsing pointer; documentation map (`extract.txt`, `sequence.txt`, `training.txt`, `BATCH_RUNBOOK`, `SCALE_UP_PLAN`).
`extract.txt` — satu baris queue via `run-next` (mengganti checklist manual 6a/7a/8a).
`sequence.txt` — batch via `run-until-empty` / `worker.py`; prefilter & runbook pointers.
`training.txt` — URL manual + `row.py run --url`; parse-only iteration + sample konfirmasi; adjustment table selaras `templates/` + `test_fixtures/`.
§3.5 Fase E2 — `migrate_fase_e2.py`; imports `core.*` di `processors/`, `parsers/platform/`, tests, `extract_tabular`, `intake/filter`.

§3.2 platform — pilot templates: `asn_pns`, `daftar_umkm`, `data_relawan`, `anggota_komunitas`, `daftar_rt`, `pengumuman_hasil_seleksi`, `contact_person`, `dapil`; fixtures `scripts/test_fixtures/pipeline/text/by_template/`; `compare_extract_batch --per-template-fixture`.
§1.3 — `pipeline/commit.py`; `prepare-commit --commit` dengan redaction gate.
§1.1 / batch — `queue_entries.expected`, `queue_prefilter`, `triage_pending`, `parallel_download` + retry, `docs/BATCH_RUNBOOK.md`.
§2.5 — `ops/pdf_fixture_report.py` (`make pdf-fixtures`).
Tests — `scripts/test_*.py` + `make test` (67 cases); bukan folder `tests/` di root.
`scripts/pipeline_row.py` — linear phases (`mark_processing` → … → `cleanup`) with JSON outcomes; no manual 6a/7a branches.
`scripts/pipeline_eligibility.py` — automated retry (re-classify, multi-template assess, roster signals, parse probe).
`queue.py process-next` / `process-batch` — delegates to `pipeline_row.py`.
`AGENT.md` / `next_sequence.txt` — runbook moved to orchestrator.
1 person — Doc `01KSFEAGNM01C2TQXKMSNQ2GAV`, template `biodata`.

1,916 persons — 1,909 created, 8 updated via phone dedup. Doc `01KSD6WNH2N9M8ZH5J4G9N187W`. Scribd PDF download blocked (captcha); processed from `download_scribd_text` / pre-fetched `.txt`.

sections.kind: Added — Singowangi population roster format support (data_induk_desa)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — Auto-detect Marawali vs Singowangi format. Singowangi: sheet "Sheet1", title row "PENDUDUK <DESA>", data starts at row 2 with fixed column mapping (NIK, KK, nama, gender, marital, POB, DOB, religion, family status, education, occupation, address, parents, kecamatan, desa).
`scripts/process_data_induk_desa.py` — Made generic: reads title/description/sheet from meta in parsed JSON instead of hardcoded Marawali values.
`templates/data_induk_desa.json` — Updated notes to mention Singowangi format auto-detection.

sections.kind: Workflow — skip download when file already provided
items: `next_manual.txt` — Step 3 now explicitly says: if file already exists in `tmp/` (provided by user), skip download and proceed to step 4.
Scribd xlsx — Population roster Desa Singowangi, Kecamatan Kutorejo, Mojokerto. 3,487 persons with NIK, KK, family relations, education, occupation, address.
Doc `01KSD6Y5F3EGGBFP7982V9H9BS` (backfilled facts).
3,487 persons: All with NIK, KK linkage, gender, marital status, POB, DOB, religion, family role, education, occupation.
OSINT: N/A (no phone/email columns in roster).

sections.kind: Added — Monex Investindo Futures nasabah xlsx (Scribd mis-titled "Data Indonesia")
items: `scripts/parse_nasabah_monex.py` — Multi-sheet branch roster (AC, nasabah, telepon, email, no identitas). Header auto-detect with optional sub-header row; dedup by name+phone+email+AC.
`scripts/process_nasabah_monex.py` — document + BatchProcessor + phone/email/document edges.
`templates/data_nasabah_monex.json` — Classify keywords for Monex/futures; skip OCR for xlsx.
`scripts/pipeline_routes.py` — Orphan hint for `parse_nasabah_monex`.
9,443 persons — 9,397 phones, 1,006 emails across 19 branch sheets. Doc `01KSD6M6HY1AC44VYG3KZTXF04`. Source title on Scribd misleading; content is PT Monex Investindo Futures customer database.

sections.kind: Added — student roster processor (SD/SMP/SMA xlsx with parent columns)
items: `scripts/process_student_roster.py` — BatchProcessor-based process script for student roster XLSX from Scribd. Handles multi-sheet files with NISN, NIK, KK, DOB, phone, parent info. Parents stored as extra fields (not separate persons).
`templates/data_akademik.json` — Added `parser`/`processor` fields pointing to `process_student_roster.py`.

sections.kind: Processed — Data Daftar Ulang Peserta Didik Baru SD Negeri Lempeh TP 2025-2026
items: Scribd xlsx — `905629927-Data-Daftar-Ulang-Peserta-Didik-Baru-Sd-Negeri-Lempeh-Tp-2025-2026` from `ppid.sarolangunkab.go.id` (mirrored via Scribd). 8 active sheets (kelas 1A–5), 221 students.
221 persons: Students with NIK (204), NISN (191), phone (211), DOB (212), gender, religion, address, parent names/occupations/education.
Doc `01KSD5B638WDNR27R1W6WC38PP`.
OSINT: 211 phones, 0 emails. 1 phone scanned (test), remaining skipped (minors' data).

sections.kind: Added — student roster xlsx parser (ad-hoc, not a permanent script)
items: Used inline Python (not a dedicated `parse_*.py`) to extract 221 student records from multi-sheet xlsx. Handles Google Form formula cells via `data_only=True`, variable header rows (row 1–3), datetime DOB normalization.
`tmp/wCp3MdBlWc3iAGaIu2M81mdn4e7hKy9y5uRRExaQ.pdf` — LHKPN a.n. SABKI (Kasi PMD Kec. Mandiangin Timur). OCR via pdftotext, template `lhkpn`.
4 persons: SABKI + AHWANI (istri) + IMAM SYAH RENDY KURNIAWAN + AFRIZA SARAH KURNIATY (anak). NIK, NPWP, KK, phone, email, assets, family, employment.
Doc `01KSD4N4GRWNVB6M5NVD1PKR3W`.

sections.kind: Added — script-backed parser routing (stop AGENT.md growth)
items: `scripts/pipeline_routes.py` — Resolves template → `parse_*.py` / `process_*.py` from `templates/*.json` and on-disk scripts. CLI: `show`, `list`, `script`, `scripts`.
`AGENT.md` — Removed `## Critical Context` scratchpad; added Parser routing + maintenance rules (no per-template append).
`next_manual.txt` — Step 8 uses `pipeline_routes.py` instead of a growing parser bullet list; step 18 limits AGENT.md edits to generic rules.
`templates/_schema.json` — Documents optional `parser` / `processor` / `notes` fields for route discovery.
